description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular, single-story brick building with a flat concrete roof. The main facade features large, evenly spaced windows and a pair of central double doors, suggesting a functional industrial use. The brickwork is uniform and unadorned, emphasizing practicality over decoration. The side and rear walls are solid brick with no visible openings, reinforcing the secure, utilitarian nature of the structure. The roof is flat and appears to be made of concrete, with subtle raised sections along the edges. The overall design is robust and straightforward, suitable for storage or light industrial purposes in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular brick warehouse with a flat concrete roof, large front windows, and central double doors, designed for industrial or storage use.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing security and privacy.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain brick wall and the flat expanse of the concrete roof, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: The front view highlights large windows, a pair of central double doors, and a symmetrical brick facade, indicating the main entrance.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a featureless brick wall and the flat roof.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is constructed of red brick with a symmetrical arrangement of large rectangular windows and a central set of double metal doors. The design is functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on accessibility and natural light.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and made of concrete, with several evenly spaced raised sections along the perimeter, and no visible skylights or rooftop equipment.
